title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Web Research — DuckDuckGo + Wikipedia research CLI with URL fetching, conte...
content:
DuckDuckGo + Wikipedia research CLI with URL fetching, content extraction, citation export

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/web-research
GitHub: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/web-research
